title: Jacob (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jacob''' is the first name of an individual:
*'''[[Jacob Nive]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]].

Out-of-universe, it is also the part of two individuals' names:
*'''[[Jacob Witkin]]''', an actor who portrayed [[Morgan Katarn]].
*'''[[David Jacob Beckett]]''', an inker.

{{Disambig}}
